subject: Drop -kernel from QEMU2 when shared mmap is in use
description:
Edit qemu_handback.hpp spawn_qemu to omit `-kernel <elf>` when shared_mem_path is non-empty. Memory is preserved by the shared mmap; PC is restored via gdbstub P32 packet so the ELF entry point is irrelevant. Keep -kernel for tier-1 (no shared mmap) callers.</description>
<parameter name="activeForm">Dropping -kernel from QEMU2 spawn when shared mmap is set
